CoSparTA 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • CoSparTA Pipeline Walkthrough

Fast Sparse EZ Aggregation Wrapper

calc_EZ_3d_fast.Rd

Thin R wrapper around calc_EZ_3d_cpp that accepts the same sparse coordinate-format data.table x used by calc_EZ_3d(), making the Rcpp replacement a drop-in at the call site in CoSparTA() and CoSparTA_missing().

Usage

calc_EZ_3d_fast(x, alpha_k, n, p, w)

Arguments

x

A data.table with integer columns V1, V2, V3 (1-based indices) and a numeric column x (observed counts).

alpha_k

Numeric vector of length nrow(x): rank-k responsibilities.

n

Integer. L-mode (user) dimension.

p

Integer. F-mode (time) dimension.

w

Integer. W-mode (channel) dimension.

Value

Named list with rs (length n), cs (length p), zs (length w).

On this page
